{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = Fist Icon
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Fist Icon]] is also known as the [[Strength Icon]] or the [[Symbol of Bodily Power]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
